2206860.name: The Unforeseen Resurrection - Otome Isekai RPG
2206860.description:
[CONTENT WARNING]

  • ! Contains some scary scenes !

  • If the camera makes you dizzy:

    • please press the middle mouse button to lock the camera's up/down movement, and/or

    • if it's still making you dizzy, please go to "Settings" and uncheck the "Camera Collider" toggle

    • I hope you stay safe, happy and healthy! ദ്ദി(˵ •̀ ᴗ - ˵ ) ✧

  • Themes of otome isekai

    • character death & rebirth via time travel

    • bullying (& fighting back after rebirth! >:D )

[WORK IN PROGRESS]

The game and demo are in active development.

The screenshots show the current state of the features.

Things are still subject to change, i.e. features can be added, removed, changed, etc...

[STORY] Otome isekai

'My boyfriend got dumped by his lover, then he dumped my body in the sewer.' Muttered a woman in her head. It was the only memory she had.

With her body feeling light, the woman opened her eyes, when-!

She found herself floating in a dark void, and then-!

A game-like screen popped up in front of her face!

"I-I think I am..." The woman sputtered with a dumbfounded look on her face.

Game-like screen: "You Died. You have enough gold. Wanna go back in time?"

"I-I'M IN A GAME!!!"

[GAMEPLAY]

It's an otome game with gameplay. Below are the features.

[PLANNED but UNCONFIRMED FEATURES]

  • Farming - implemented in prototype

  • Multiplayer - very very resource and time heavy, uncertain

  • Small Open World - implemented in prototype

  • Dress Up - implemented in prototype

  • Dating Sim / Life Sim - most mechanics implemented in prototype, needs more

  • Hack and Slash - Might turn it into something less violent, like in Sailor Moon, the "attack" save people-turned-monsters instead

  • Choose Your Own Adventure - most mechanics implemented in prototype, needs more 

  • Female Protagonist - implemented in prototype

  • Character Customization (with limits) - implemented in prototype with sample clothes, needs more clothes

  • Pet - implemented something, but didn't include in prototype. Might need a better implementation

[GAME PLATFORMS]

Windows: This is the initial platform during the development
